title: AE2 Terminal Mouse Wheel Scrolling
description: (Client side) Scroll through your installed terminals using the mouse wheel!
body:
Allows you to cycle through your installed terminals using the mouse wheel.

## Features

*   Scroll through your active terminals by holding down a key (not bound by default, will not work if unbound) and scrolling.
*   Uses your installed terminal order, as it would normally by the Universal Terminal.

## Requirements

*   [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)
*   [Applied Energistics 2 Wireless Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/applied-energistics-2-wireless-terminals)

## Compatibility

Should work with any terminals that can be added to the Universal Terminal.

Tested with so far:

*   ME Requester
*   Extended AE
*   Expanded AE
*   Advanced AE

## Usage

1.  Bind "Scroll Modifier".
2.  Open a compatible terminal, hold the key, and scroll away.

## Credits

*   [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)
*   [Applied Energistics 2 Wireless Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/applied-energistics-2-wireless-terminals)
